feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Questions about workers and business partners in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
1. When creating employees using Manage Workforce app creates 2 Business Partner user IDs when you create the Worker details and Work agreement details.
2. How to extend the Employee to Supplier customer data for mass creation without doing it manually in Maintain Business partner App.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Set Up the SEPA Direct Debit Pre Notification
entry.content:
Hello team,


We want to set up the SEPA Direct Debit notification.

Can you please guide us on how to set this up?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Copy custom field from sales order line item to PR line item
entry.content:
Hi,

We are working on SAP public cloud implementation. I have a custom field at sales order line item. In third party process, I would like this custom field to be copied to corresponding line of purchase requisition. In custom field App, there is no option to carry forward the custom field from sales order line to purchase requisition line. 

Did anyone experience such scenario?

Thanks,

Ketan

entry.title: S4HANA Cloud - form title doesn't show in page 3 and so on.
entry.content:
Hi,

The problem is if PDF files have more than 2 pages, the title doesn't show in page 3 and so on.

The master form template has 1 pageSet which contains 2 pages - mst1 and mst2.

I've checked the standard logic in txtPrintFormTitleText under frmHiddenGlobalFields in content form template.

	//Set title on first page (always available)
	xfa.resolveNode("#pageSet[0].mst1.FirstPage.frmHeader.txtTitle") = form_title
	
	//Set title on subsequent pages (if available)
	var pageCount = xfa.layout.pageCount();

	if (pageCount > "1")
	then
		xfa.resolveNode("#pageSet[0].mst2.SubsequentPage.frmHeader.txtTitle") = form_title
	endif

 But I couldn't find any problem in the code.

Has anyone seen this behaviour before?

Regards,

Tri

entry.title: Unable to modify Qty in SKU field in MIGO Screen
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts!

I have created custom fields and used custom logic to calculate quantity in all three unit of measure. Now i want to update the QTY IN SKU field with this calculated value, but it's protected from modification and getting error as "The field cannot be modified" I tried modifying with "Change Item data in material documents" Badi.

The requirement now is once the field QTY IN SKU got modified it should update the values where used like stock list etc.

Kindly help how to achieve?

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to get WBS element field data into the XML file for PO print in SAP Public loud
entry.content:
Hi all,

I was trying to generate XML for the PO output but i was unable to find the "WBS Element", also the same field is not available in the data Source and the data source not extendable as well.

However the same field is available in GRN XML file. Can anyone suggest me how to add the WBS Element in the data source/XML file for PO print.

Below is the WBS Element in GRN XML file. "

"

Awaiting for your suggestions.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Standard email template for Sales Quotations
entry.content:
Hi,

We've seen that there is a standard email template for Sales Orders in the 'Maintain Email Templates' app: SD_SLS_DEFAULT_EMAIL_TEMPLATE. However, we need a standard template to use for Sales Quotations, is there a standard one available for quotations as well?

Kind regards.

[removed by moderator]


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Printing setup in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
How do we do printing and what kind of setup needs to be done?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to configure T042E_WANFF(Number of Days Until Bill of Exchange Pmnt Request Due Date)
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I would appreciate it so much if you would take the time to read and answer my question. 


■Customer requirement
I'm currently customizing the bill of exchange process for Japan in S/4HANA Public Cloud. The customer requirement is to change the due date for BOE payable (see the table below) based on vendors. The span from the posting date can be 1 to 3 months, but it depends on the vendors. (In the case of the table below, the span is 1 month.)
 

MMDDYYYYActionDue Date
12/16/2024Posting an invoice with the payment method O(for BOE)01/31/2025
01/31/2025Running an Automatic Payment Program to post a BOE for the invoice02/28/2025
02/28/2025Clearing the BOE-

 

 


■How I'm trying to deal with it 
For this requirement, I'm currently trying to configure T042E_WANFF in Set Up Payment Methods per Company Code for Payment Transactions(101044) so that I can configure the span for each payment method and then properly assign them to vendors.
■The problem that I have
Is there any way for activating this item? It seems perferct for this requirement, but somehow unavailable to change right now.(Please refer to the image attached.)


Another option would be to maintain terms of payment to have two dates : one is for the invoice, and the other is for the BoE.

Thank you,


Kaito

entry.title: In asset master data quantity field need to be editable while creating the master data
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

While creating asset master data in S4hana public cloud user needs to give quantity so that while creating Purchase order quantity should not be exceeded than what has been mentioned in the master data.

Now while creating asset master data quantity field is showing grayed out.

Please guide me on this issue to resolve.

entry.title: Depreciation start date is taking month beginning date irrespective of asset capitalization/purchase
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In S4Hana public cloud for depreciation key LINS depreciation start date is currently defaulting to the first day of the month, rather than the actual purchase date. Once the asset is acquired I have edited the start of depreciation date but depreciation planned values are not changing according to the depreciation start date.

Please advice how I can resolve this.

Thank you.

entry.title: Migrate your data: FI - Accounts payable open item
entry.content: "I want to upload supplier payments using the 'Migrate Your Data' app with the template: FI- Accounts Payable Open Item. Although I have filled in the house bank value and the account details ID of the house bank, when I reach the simulate step, the system shows an error as shown in the image below. Is there any way to resolve this error?"

entry.title: S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition apps equivalent to TCODE SM04 and SM37
entry.content:
Hello experts!

We are looking for SAP Public Cloud apps that can cover the function of the TCODES SM04 (managing sessions) and SM37 (checking job logs).

Could you tell us which apps correspond to these TCODES or if such apps exist?

Best Regards,

Fujita

entry.title: Default Company Code in S/4HANA Public Cloud Organization Structure
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are doing the initial set up of a new Development box in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. While trying to confirm, we have got an error to define a Default Company Code. After some research, it's clear for us a company code must be defined as default, however it is not clear what is the functional impact of a default company code not if it would possible to change to another company code in the future. Also, is there any relation between this default company code and the one each user can define in her/his own setting?

Any clarity will be much appreciated!

Regards.

entry.title: Subscribe Path in Autoflow
entry.content:
I create Autoflow in SAP Sales Cloud V2 for Sales Order in order to create data from sales cloud v2 to s4hana public cloud system via Integration Suite.

I would like to know which path should be entered for Subscribe Path.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Using the Employee Central Assignment ID as Personnel Number (PERNR) in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently implementing S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (S4C) and Successfactors Employee Central (SF). The automatic replication of employees from SF to S4C is part of this.

We would like to have the personnel number of a Worker in S4C (Work Agreement field Personnel Number) to be the same as the number in SF, the SF Assignment ID / User ID field.

According to note DIGITS this should be possible, because the prerequisites are fulfilled:

* We have not yet activated the employee replication from SF to S4C for any SF and S4 system.

* And we have activated the Assignment ID in SF.

But I wonder if it will remain possible to create Workers also manually after the feature to copy the personnel number from SF is activated. Is this still possible?

The situation in our company is that we have both internal employees and external (contingent) workers.

We are a recruitment and secondment agency for SAP consultants hiring external workers on an individual basis for long-term assignments at customers. So these people are no employees of our company but only workers which we hire and rehire to customers through S4C Professional Services customer projects and purchase orders. They should not be part of Successfactors.

I know that Successfactors also has functionality to define contingent employees but for these people this brings unnecessary additional license costs. We do not need any SF functionality for these people. They only have to enter their working hours in the S4C timesheet weekly.

So the question is, can we activate the assignment ID replication from SF to S4C and still create external workers manually directly in S4C without running into problems?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Difference between Localization as a Self-Service and...
entry.content:
Dear Adnan,

trying to give answers for the 2 questions which are touching many general points:

  • You can  decide which extension you may create with key user extensibility and with developer extensibility. In addition the document Extend SAP S/4HANA in the cloud and on premise with ABAP based extensions  provides general guidance and typical examples. The side-by-side extensibility based on e.g. BTP provides even more freedom with regards to technical and business capabilities. There is on this requested level currently no automatized solution to differentiate the context of localization for a specific country or region from other processed extensibility steps. In general, multi-off delivery enables the development of ABAP extensions in a SAP S/4HANA Cloud system and with this supports via gCTS to deploy own solutions on other systems. In addition Scalable Solution for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is available which is designed to help partners build differentiating solutions and extensions for customers.
  • Basically, using the Configuration Localization Toolkit for the given approach and with this transforming a source country to your target country and with this adopting / extending the configuration for the given localization needs is the right approach and no violation to the SAP Best Practices. Additionally for this endeavor you may use all available extensibility options mentioned in answer 1.

entry.title: FATCA field in Vendor master
entry.content:
We are unable to find the FATCA Category field in vendor master S4 public cloud. Please help us by understanding where we can update this FATCA Category field in vendor master S4 public cloud.

Additionally, we would like to know where to maintain the same at configuration level.

Could you please help me

Regards,

Dinesh

entry.title: Payment block substitution Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello! 

i need to substitute (populate) the payment block while creating the Invoice for specific conditions.

As i can see BADI FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION doesn't have this field for substitution.

How can i achieve it in the Public cloud? can i add standard field to the list of target fields? or maybe there is another way to populate the payment block to the document?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to Post Cost to a WBS Element for a Balance Sheet Account
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a unique situation where we are trying to specifically track costs for a project that we have created a WBS element for. However, our leadership team has identified that these costs should be posted against G/L account 27003000 (Other LT liabilities). I can"t seem to assign a WBS element to anything but an expense account. How do I adjust the characteristics of the G/L Account to allow this?
